prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约99名→173名→163名→159名→167名，2021年位次极小（仅招3人），2022年扩招至21人后位次后移至173名，2023–2025年稳定在159–167名区间，近3年波动不大；2025年基准约167名；该校在陕西理科/物理类招生计划：2021年3人、2022年21人、2023年8人、2024年9人、2025年10人；2026年计划大幅扩招至24人，较2025年增加14人（+140%），扩招幅度极大，将显著拉低录取位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第4名（2021–2026年），属全国顶尖高校，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿量较多）、学生管理事件等；抖音热度排名第42位（较热），关注度一般；2021年曾出现河南理科投档线华五倒数第一的异常记录，但近年未见明显断档信号；拥有28个A类学科（A-及以上），其中机械工程、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、生物学、临床医学、工商管理、管理科学与工程、外国语言文学等8个学科获评A+，学科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、人工智能等交大王牌专业持续高热推荐；2026年陕西物理类考生约206,500人，较2025年增加约19.7%，竞争加剧；上海交通大学位于上海市（非本省），在陕西招生占比约1–2%（2025年约1.84%），属跨省招生，无本省倾斜效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次167名、2026年计划大幅扩招140%（从10人增至24人）将显著拉低位次、2026年陕西物理类考生增加约19.7%加剧竞争、以及交大顶尖名校地位对高分考生的持续吸引力，预测2026年最低位次约277名，区间227–327名。

- 工科试验班类（机械类、海洋工程类、材料科学与工程、航空航天工程、智慧能源工程、可持续能源）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 99 → 173 → 163 → 159 → 167, respectively. In 2021, the ranking was extremely low (only 3 students admitted). After expanding to 21 students in 2022, the ranking shifted to 173. From 2023 to 2025, it stabilized within the 159–167 range, with little fluctuation in recent three years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 167. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi Science/Physics Category: 3 students in 2021, 21 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 10 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 24 students, an increase of 14 students (+140%) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will notably lower the admission ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 4th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years (2021–2026), making it a top-tier national university with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, its reputation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (high number of retractions) and student management incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively popular), with moderate attention. In 2021, there was an anomaly where its Henan Science admission line ranked last among the C9 League, but no significant gaps have been observed in recent years. It has 28 A-level disciplines (A- and above), including 8 A+ disciplines: Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Biology, Clinical Medicine, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, and Foreign Languages and Literature. Its academic strength is nationally top-tier and highly matches its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Artificial Intelligence, and other flagship majors of SJTU remain highly recommended. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai (not within the province), and its enrollment share in Shaanxi is about 1–2% (approximately 1.84% in 2025), representing cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 167, the significant enrollment expansion of 140% in 2026 (from 10 to 24 students) which will notably lower the ranking, the increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi Physics Category candidates in 2026 intensifying competition, and the sustained appeal of SJTU's top-tier status to high-scoring candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 277, with a range of 227–327.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security)
- Electronic Information (IEEE Pilot Class, including Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Talent Class) (Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Information Engineering)
- Robotics Engineering (Autonomous Intelligent Leadership Class)
- Finance (including Finance-Computer Dual Degree Program)
- Science Pilot Class (Mathematics Direction) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Mechanical Engineering (Qian Xuesen Engineering Science Pilot Class, including Dual Degree Program) (Mechanical Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class (including Dual Degree Program) (Economics, Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Big Data Management and Application)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Mechanical Engineering, Ocean Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Smart Energy Engineering, Sustainable Energy)
- Science Pilot Class (Physics Direction) (Physics, Astronomy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Shanghai Jiao Tong University significantly expands enrollment in Shaanxi Physics Category to 24 students, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 277, range 227–327. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound (227) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class, IEEE Pilot Class). Those with rankings in the mid-range (250–300) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Integrated Circuit Talent Class, Robotics Engineering, Finance Dual Degree) while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates near the upper bound (327) should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety (Mechanical Qian Xuesen Class, Engineering Pilot Class), while also trying Tier 2 majors.
